hero.desc: From thin cheeks to uneven jawlines, we focus on medical assessment first, then the right plan.
hero.trust1: Founded in 2001 in KL's Golden Triangle
hero.trust2: LG 10, Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang

quickAnswers.title: What you really want to know
quickAnswers.a1: Yes, in many cases. The best option depends on the cause.
quickAnswers.a2: Results are typically described as long-lasting once growth settles.
quickAnswers.a3: Results vary and evidence is still evolving.
quickAnswers.a4: RM 3,000 - RM 15,000 depending on grafts and coverage.

understanding.title: What does "beard treatment" mean in real life?
understanding.desc: In clinic terms, beard treatment usually means one of these goals. A strong plan starts with identifying which one is your problem.
understanding.g1Desc: You have hair, but it is light, thin, or uneven.
understanding.g2Desc: You have clear gaps, islands, or sections that never filled in.
understanding.g3Desc: You used to have hair, then it started falling out in patches.
understanding.g4Desc: You have beard dandruff, itch, redness, or bumps.

causes.title: Why your beard is patchy or not growing
causes.c1Desc: Some men naturally grow thicker beards

treatments.title: What actually helps
treatments.t1Desc: Corticosteroid injections for alopecia areata. Medical review essential.
treatments.t2Desc: Platelet-rich plasma for early thinning and density support where follicles exist.
treatments.t3Desc: FUE facial hair transplant for long-term gaps, scars, or absent follicles.

assessment.title: Beard Assessment at Nexus Clinic
assessment.a1: What your beard looked like before
assessment.a2: How long the patchiness has been there
assessment.a3: Whether the skin is inflamed or itchy
assessment.a4: If you have sudden patchy loss
assessment.a5: Whether you have scars or injury lines
assessment.a6: Your goal: subtle fill or fuller defined line
assessment.approachTitle: A consult should not feel like a sales pitch
assessment.approachDesc: It should feel like someone finally understands what you are dealing with. If we suspect alopecia areata or another medical condition, we focus on diagnosis first.
assessment.quote: "Because cosmetic boosters are not the same as medical treatment."

cost.title: Beard Treatment Cost in Malaysia
cost.desc: Pricing depends on coverage area, technique, and graft count. Here are real ranges from Malaysia sources:
cost.r1: RM 7,000 - RM 15,000 for beard transplant ranges
cost.r3: RM 5,000 - RM 10,000 at Nexus Clinic (guide only)
cost.warning: If a clinic gives pricing without seeing your beard area, that is a red flag. Beard work is custom.

dandruff.title: Beard dandruff and beard skin problems
dandruff.desc: A beard can look patchy even when hair exists, simply because the skin is inflamed.

faq.q1: How can I grow a beard faster?
faq.a1: There is no instant switch. Beard growth depends on genetics, hormones, and follicle activity.
faq.a2: Common reasons include genetics, alopecia areata, scarring, and skin inflammation.
faq.a3: Yes, once growth is established, results are typically described as long-lasting.
faq.q4: Does a beard transplant look natural?
faq.a4: It can, when the surgeon plans the direction, angle, and density correctly.

cta.title: Ready for a beard that looks even, natural, and confident?
cta.desc: Start with a proper assessment. We'll help you understand the cause, then choose the right path.
